name: Final Fantasy multiverse Rpg
description:
update: I added some mechanics, obviously I'm still testing them, but I would like your Feedback, the mechanics introduced are: Materia System, Junction System, Ability system (FFIX), Spherography system, I will continue to add other mechanics, I made sure that it reflects the original world, but I also made sure that you can use it even where that mechanic does not exist, so as to give you free choice... oh I almost forgot I also added Blitzball, always that it reflects the world in question, but you still have the possibility of doing it even in a world where it does not exist, always for free choice, I hope to receive your Feedback.

I wanted to make another RPG, this time set in Final Fantasy, since I'm a big fan of the series, so here it is, I had a lot of fun playing it during testing, the things I added are: all Final Fantasy, except XI and XIV, I might add them later, all the classic icons: Chocobo, Moogle, Summons, Cactuar and much more.

a leveling system, inventory, and summoning system, I made it so that you can acquire Summons, which are not simple objects, but entities that you could find, or they find you, if you pass their test, they allow you to use them, in battle, I put quite a few Summons, but I could add more, that said, you can go to any Final Fantasy you want, or have a story created for you,

in any case it's a journey you should take...

Remember to use Memory Chat for important things!
creator: Gallicus
